📲 Install SICE OPS as Desktop App
⭐ Method 1 — Chrome App Shortcut (Recommended)
1. In Chrome, go to the menu (⋮) → More tools → Create shortcut
2. Tick "Open as window"
3. Click Create
4. Your app will appear on the desktop and taskbar — opens without browser UI ✓
✅ Method 2 — Install via Chrome Address Bar
1. Download both files: OPS_SICE.html and manifest.json to the same folder
2. Open Chrome → type localhost or use a local server
3. A ⊕ Install icon will appear in the address bar
4. Click it → Install
🚀 Method 3 — Quick Local Server (Advanced)
Open PowerShell in the app folder and run:
npx serve . Then open http://localhost:3000 in Chrome — install icon will appear automatically.
